meta/guides::0:0.heading: Guides & Tutorials
meta/guides::0:0.text: Welcome to the Sunder TTRPG guides section. Here you'll find helpful tutorials on how to use various features of this website. Highlighting Feature Reporting Issues Navigation Tips ---

meta/guides::1:0.heading: Highlighting Feature
meta/guides::1:0.text: When you select text on any page in the Sunder documentation (on desktop), a popup toolbar appears with several helpful actions. This guide explains each button and how to use them. Try it out! Select any text on this page to see the highlight popup in action.

meta/guides::2:0.heading: Copy Text
meta/guides::2:0.text: Copies the selected text to your clipboard. Perfect for quoting rules or sharing specific passages with your gaming group. Tip: The button shows a checkmark when the text is successfully copied.

meta/guides::3:0.heading: Report Issue
meta/guides::3:0.text: Found a typo, unclear wording, or something that doesn't seem right? Click this button to report the issue directly. The selected text is automatically included in your report. Tip: You'll be taken to a form where you can add more details about the issue.

meta/guides::4:0.heading: Ask a Question
meta/guides::4:0.text: Confused about a rule or need clarification? This opens a dialog where you can ask a question about the highlighted text. The Archivist will receive your question and may update the documentation or respond directly. Tip: You can optionally include your contact info (Discord, email) for a direct response.

meta/guides::5:0.heading: Copy Link
meta/guides::5:0.text: Creates a direct link to the section where your selected text appears. Great for sharing specific rules with your gaming group or bookmarking important passages. Tip: The link includes the nearest heading anchor for precise navigation.

meta/guides::6:0.heading: Keyboard Accessibility
meta/guides::6:0.text: The highlight popup is fully accessible via keyboard: Tab to move between buttons in the popup Enter or Space to activate the focused button Escape to dismiss the popup (clicking outside also works) ---

meta/guides::7:0.heading: Reporting Issues
meta/guides::7:0.text: We rely on feedback from the community to improve Sunder TTRPG. Here's how to report different types of issues:

meta/guides::8:0.heading: Using the Highlight Popup
meta/guides::8:0.text: Select the problematic text Click the (Report Issue) button Fill out the form with details about what seems wrong Submit your report

meta/guides::9:0.heading: Using the Report Form Directly
meta/guides::9:0.text: You can also visit the Report an Issue page directly to submit feedback without highlighting text first.

meta/guides::10:0.heading: What to Include
meta/guides::10:0.text: When reporting an issue, try to include: The specific location (page and section) What seems wrong (typo, unclear wording, broken link, etc.) Suggested fix (if you have one) Your contact (optional, if you'd like a response) ---

meta/guides::11:0.heading: Searching the Documentation
meta/guides::11:0.text: Use the search bar at the top of the page to quickly find rules, terms, or concepts. The search supports: Keywords (e.g., "stress", "volatility") Partial matches Phrase searches

meta/guides::12:0.heading: Using the Sidebar
meta/guides::12:0.text: The sidebar navigation is organized into sections: Lore - Background story and world information Ruleset - Game mechanics and rules Preferences - User settings, display settings (Coming Soon)

meta/guides::13:0.heading: Keyboard Shortcuts
meta/guides::13:0.text: / - Focus the search bar Arrow keys - Navigate search results Enter - Select a search result

meta/guides::14:0.heading: Mobile Navigation
meta/guides::14:0.text: On mobile devices, tap the hamburger menu ( ) to open the navigation drawer. All top-level sections (Lore, Ruleset, About) are always visible: tap any section to expand or collapse its pages inline. Your current section and page are automatically highlighted so you always know where you are. --- Have suggestions for new guides? Let us know! Back to About
